author: krisoshea.eth
content: Hey <@686695036733227017> sorry I know you’re super busy but just wanted to ask, in terms of the weekly write ups, where will you be posting the feedback or will you reach out to us individually when you have time to give feedback? Just curious how it works, really want to improve my technical communication and write up skills over the course of the fellowship. Thanks a mill!

author: tmiychao
content: I read every update and when there is something that stands out that needs my input, I will comment on PR or reach out directly. Mostly I am just observing unless I notice that you are missing something in your research, got stuck or doing something wrong. And you can always reach out for specific feedback or input from me

author: tmiychao
content: I am sorry I've been responding very sporadically past week and left many of you unanswered. There is a lot of PRs waiting and today I am finally getting to read your updates and messages properly. I have been OOO and we have been dealing with many internal changes as you probably read about EF so I apologize I haven't been very active. I am officially back in the office starting today 🙂

author: krisoshea.eth
content: Ah ok cool cool thanks for clarifying. That makes total sense. Ok brilliant ye I might shoot you a message for specific feedback if that’s ok but I understand if you don’t have time

author: krisoshea.eth
content: No worries whatsoever! Ye it looks like a busy week at the EF for sure, I hope the transition is going ok. Great to hear that you’re back today!
